name: cc2wx
description: Claude Code ↔ WeChat bridge via MCP Channel protocol

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const p=require('path'),fs=require('fs');const d=[p.join(__dirname,'node_modules','@pinixai','weixin-bot'),p.join(__dirname,'..','@pinixai','weixin-bot')].find(x=>fs.existsSync(x));if(!d){console.log('weixin-bot not found, skipping postinstall');process.exit(0);}process.chdir(d);require('child_process').execSync('npm install --no-save @types/node && npx tsc --project tsconfig.json',{stdio:'inherit'})"
